//: Campus outer boundary. This is the ONLY file you need to edit to move/resize the dotted campus border shown on the map. Edit the 'coordinates' ring below — each pair is [longitude, latitude], the ring must start and end with the same point, and you can add/remove/move points freely. The map reloads this file on every page load, and also uses it (together with buildings.json) to decide how far the map is allowed to pan/zoom, so keep it roughly the size of the real campus.
